success.title: Registration Complete
success.body: Instance has been registered. You can launch from system apps list.

failed.title: Registration Failed
failed.body: An error occurred during registration. Please retry or check environment.

complete.title: Delete Complete
complete.content: The selected instance has been deleted successfully!

confirm.title: Confirm Delete
confirm.content: Are you sure you want to delete this instance? This operation cannot be undone.

failed.title: Launch Error
failed.content: Check instance files and required runtimes, and make sure there are no incompatible mods/add-ons/resource packs before trying again.

completing.title: Completing missing DLL
completing.body: Downloading and completing vcruntime140_1.dll, please wait…

installing.title: Installing Visual C++ Runtime
installing.body: Downloading and installing Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime, please wait…

missing.title: Visual C++ Runtime Missing
missing.body: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64) is required to run the game. Install now?

loading.title: Launching Minecraft
loading.body: Waiting for the game window to appear, please wait…

success.title: Shortcut Created
success.body: A desktop shortcut for this instance has been created.

installing.title: Installing GameInput
installing.body: Downloading and starting the installer. Follow system prompts to complete.

missing.title: GameInput Component Missing
missing.body: Microsoft GameInput is required to run the game. Install now?

missing.title: Microsoft Gaming Services Missing
missing.body: Microsoft Gaming Services was not detected. This dependency is required for Minecraft.

install_confirm.title: Installation Completed?
install_confirm.body: After finishing installation, click 'Done, Recheck'. Otherwise continue installing.

tip.version_selector: Use the version dropdown to switch the current instance quickly.
tip.version_search: Search by instance name or game version before selecting from the dropdown list.
tip.manage_versions: Click "Manage Versions" in the dropdown panel to install, import, or organize instances.
tip.quick_actions_menu: The menu next to the launch button provides instance settings, desktop shortcut, game folder, and system registration actions.
tip.launch_dependencies: If GameInput, VC++ Runtime, or Gaming Services are missing, LeviLauncher guides you through installing them before launch.
tip.mods_card: The Mods card shows enabled mods for the current instance and opens the full Mods page in one click.
tip.content_counts_card: The Content card shows world, resource pack, and behavior pack counts, and each row opens the matching page.
tip.incompatible_resource_packs: If incompatible resource packs are detected, click the warning row to review them directly.
tip.content_download_sources: Use the download card to browse CurseForge or lip content sources without leaving the launcher.
tip.settings_personalize: Settings lets you adjust theme, color, background, and other appearance options to match your setup.
tip.settings_storage_path: You can change storage paths in Settings. Make sure the target directory is writable before moving content.
tip.download_mirror: If downloads are slow, try switching mirrors or related network options in Settings.
tip.open_source: LeviLauncher is open source. Use GitHub issues to report launcher problems or suggest improvements.
tip.backup_worlds: Back up important worlds regularly before testing new resource packs, behavior packs, or mods.

download_manager.title: Download Manager
download_manager.description: View and manage current download tasks

updating.title: Updating LeviLauncher
updating.body: Requesting administrator permission and performing update. Do not close this window during update.

errors.generic: The update could not be completed. Please try again later.
errors.update_admin_required: Administrator permission is required to continue the update.
errors.update_asset_missing: The required update package is missing or named incorrectly.
errors.update_download_failed: Failed to download the update package.
errors.update_install_failed: Failed to install the update package.
errors.update_restart_failed: Updated launcher failed to restart automatically.

install_folder.enable_isolation_desc: Redirect game data (worlds, settings, caches, etc.) to versions/<name>/ instead of storing in AppData.
install_folder.inherit_hint: Copy data from an isolated version with matching type

mirror.title: Select Download Mirror
mirror.no_mirrors: No mirrors available for this version.

install.hint: Please wait, this process may take a while…

custom_installer.label: Choose local installer (.msixvc)
custom_installer.hint: Defaults to using files in the installers directory

install.levilamina_unsupported: LeviLamina is not supported for this game version
install.title: Install

onboarding.title: First Launch Setup
onboarding.subtitle: Please set content path and language first

unsaved.title: Unsaved Changes
unsaved.body: You have unsaved changes to the content path. Do you want to save before finishing?

layout.desc_navbar: Enable to use the top navigation bar instead of the default vertical sidebar

unsaved.title: Unsaved Changes
unsaved.body: You changed the content path but haven't saved it. Save and leave?

discord_rpc.title: Discord Rich Presence
discord_rpc.desc: Show your game status on Discord

experimental.title: Experimental Features
experimental.desc: Try unfinished capabilities here. These features may change, break, or disappear without notice.

instance_backup.title: Instance backup (Experimental)
instance_backup.desc: Enable backup and restore actions in instance settings. This feature is still experimental.

warning.title: Enable experimental instance backup?
warning.body_1: This feature is intended for developers and testers only. Do not use production data casually.
warning.body_2: Backup format, included scope, and restore compatibility may change in future builds, and forward compatibility is not guaranteed.
warning.body_3: Please make sure you understand the risks, and decide whether to enable it only after reading this warning in full for 10 seconds.

confirm.title: Restore default path?
confirm.body: This will reset the content path to the default location. Are you sure?

status.up_to_date: Current version is up to date

error.lip_fetch_release: Failed to fetch lip package metadata
error.lip_release_asset_not_found: The latest lip metadata does not contain a Windows x64 package
error.lip_download_dotnet_installer: Failed to download the .NET 10 installer script
error.lip_download_archive: Failed to download the lip .tgz package
error.lip_open_archive: Failed to open the lip .tgz package
error.lip_create_target_dir: Failed to create the lip install directory
error.lip_verify_install: Failed to verify the installed lip version

startup_prompt.title: lip update available
startup_prompt.description: A newer lip version is available ({{currentVersion}} -> {{latestVersion}}). LeviLauncher will not update it automatically. Go to Settings > Components to update it manually.

appearance.edit_mode_desc: Personalization settings (colors, opacity, etc.) are saved independently for Light and Dark modes. Switch tabs on the right to configure each mode.
appearance.theme_schedule_desc: Automatically switch to dark mode during the specified time period
appearance.theme_auto_desc: Automatically switch theme based on local sunrise and sunset times
appearance.theme_color_desc: The primary accent color of the application
appearance.background_image_desc: Select a folder to pick images from as background
appearance.background_base_mode_desc: Add a solid color mask under the background image to enhance contrast
appearance.disable_animations_desc: Turn off interface transition animations to improve performance

analytics.title: Anonymous Usage Analytics (Microsoft Clarity)
analytics.desc: When enabled, this helps us improve features and UI. You can turn it off at any time.

about.description: LeviLauncher - A Modern Minecraft Bedrock Launcher
about.author: Author
about.thanks.desc: Special thanks to individuals and projects supporting LeviLauncher.
about.sponsors.desc: Thanks to all sponsors and supporters for the project's development!
about.contribute.desc: Contributions via Issues or Pull Requests are welcome to improve LeviLauncher.
about.license.tip: See LICENSE in the repository for license details.

useravatar.no_login_retry: Xbox login not detected (click to retry)

contentpage.update_material_bin_modal_content: This will update the .material.bin header in the shader pack so Minecraft can load it correctly.
contentpage.update_material_bin_risk_content: The updated resource pack may not work properly in older versions of Minecraft. It is recommended to backup your worlds or export the resource pack first.
contentpage.transfer_resources_body_overview: This will transfer all resource packs, behavior packs, skin packs, and worlds from the current instance to the target instance. Please select a target instance.
contentpage.transfer_resources_body_simple: Please select a target instance to transfer to.
contentpage.transfer_progress_body: Please wait while resources are transferred to selected instances.
contentpage.require_player_for_world_import: Select a player before importing a world (.mcworld)
contentpage.select_player_for_import: Please select the player to import to
contentpage.delete_pack_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
contentpage.delete_selected_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} items?
contentpage.delete_world_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete world {{name}}?
contentpage.delete_screenshot_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete screenshot {{name}}?
contentpage.screenshot_viewer_nav_hint: Use ← / → keys or buttons to switch screenshots

edit.title: Instance Settings
edit.hint: Only rename the folder. Game version and type are unaffected.
edit.delete_hint: Permanently deletes this instance from your device, including worlds, configs, and installed content. This action cannot be undone.
edit.danger_hint: These actions affect the instance registration or local files. Double-check before continuing.

backup.title: Instance Backup
backup.hint: Create a backup for this instance before changing settings, installing mods, or trying something new
backup.section_body: Choose the game content and mods you want to keep together; the launcher app itself is not included
backup.experimental_disabled: Enable this in {{settingsPath}} before using instance backup and restore.
backup.dialog_body: Select what you want to keep in this backup
backup.shared_warning: This instance shares the same game data as the system default install, so including game data will back up that shared content too
backup.no_scope_selected: Please choose at least one item to back up
backup.progress_body: Packaging the selected scopes. Please wait...

full.label: Full mode
full.warning: A full backup includes content outside the Users whitelist and may contain account caches, privacy-sensitive data, or other files that should not be shared.

restore.dialog_body: Choose what to restore from this backup. If conflicts are found, they will be listed before restoring so you can choose each resolution.
restore.lip_summary: Detected {{count}} lip-managed packages. Restore will try to reinstall them automatically.
restore.conflict_summary: {{count}} conflicts were found with the current instance. Choose whether to keep the backup version or the current version for each item.
restore.conflict_empty: No conflicts were found for the selected scopes. You can restore directly.
restore.conflict_choice_placeholder: Choose how to resolve this conflict
restore.conflict_unresolved: Please choose how to resolve every conflict before restoring.
restore.success_body: The selected content has been restored.
restore.partial_body: Some content was restored, but a few items still need manual attention.
restore.failed_body: This restore did not complete. Check the results below.

edit.unregister_hint: Unregister this instance from the system so it no longer appears in the system app list. This will not delete any files.

unregister_success.title: Unregister Successful
unregister_success.body: Successfully unregistered. You can now delete this version.

loader.ll_select_guidance: Choose the LeviLamina version you want to install, upgrade, downgrade, or reinstall.
loader.ll_remove_confirm_body: LeviLamina will be removed from this instance.

logo.title: Custom Icon (square required)
logo.hint: Will be saved as LargeLogo.png under the version folder. Click the icon to change.

unsaved.body: You have unsaved changes to instance settings. Do you want to save before leaving?

errors.ERR_GAME_ALREADY_RUNNING: Detected the current instance of Minecraft is already running. Please close it before launching or switch to another instance.
errors.ERR_NAME_TRAILING_DOT_SPACE: Name cannot end with a dot or space
errors.ERR_NAME_RESERVED: Name is a Windows reserved word
errors.ERR_LL_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED: Selected LeviLamina version is not supported for this game version
errors.ERR_LL_NOT_SUPPORTED: LeviLamina is not supported for this game version
errors.ERR_FETCH_LL_DB: Failed to fetch LeviLamina version database
errors.ERR_LIP_INSTALL_FAILED: Failed to install LeviLamina via lip
errors.ERR_RENAME_FAILED: Rename failed, possibly in use or no permission
errors.ERR_MC_NOT_AUTHORIZED: Please ensure you own the legitimate {{typeLabel}} Minecraft license. Sign in with an account that owns the product or purchase it and retry.
errors.ERR_DELETE_FAILED: Delete failed, possibly in use or permission denied
errors.ERR_NO_GAME_DATA: No game data found for the selected source
errors.ERR_VCRUNTIME_MISSING: Runtime dependency missing. Please install Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime and retry
errors.ERR_DEV_MODE_REQUIRED: Developer Mode is not enabled, and auto-enable failed. Please enable Developer Mode manually and retry.
errors.ERR_LIP_PACKAGE_QUERY_FAILED: Failed to query lip package state
errors.ERR_LIP_PACKAGE_REQUIRED_BY_DEPENDENTS: This package is required by other installed mods and cannot be uninstalled now
errors.ERR_LIP_PACKAGE_DEMOTED_TO_DEPENDENCY: This package is still required by other installed mods, so it cannot be fully uninstalled. It has been automatically switched to dependency install mode.
errors.ERR_LL_MANAGED_IN_VERSION_SETTINGS: LeviLamina can only be managed in Version Settings
errors.ERR_LIP_NOT_INSTALLED: lip is not installed. Go to Settings > Components to install or update it manually.
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND: The instance to back up was not found
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_NO_SCOPE: Please select at least one backup scope
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_INVALID_SCOPE: The request includes an invalid backup scope
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_INVALID_SCOPE_MODE: The selected backup mode is invalid
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_GAME_DATA_NOT_FOUND: The Minecraft Bedrock data directory was not found
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_CREATE_DIR: Failed to create the instance backup directory
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_CREATE_ARCHIVE: Failed to create the instance backup archive
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_READ_SOURCE: Failed to read the backup source directory
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_WRITE_ARCHIVE: Failed to write the instance backup archive
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_ARCHIVE_OPEN: Failed to open the instance backup archive
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_INVALID_ARCHIVE: The instance backup archive format is invalid
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_MODS_STATE_UNAVAILAB: Mods/LIP state could not be verified. Refresh the instance state and try backing up again.
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_EXTRACT_ARCH: Failed to extract the instance backup archive
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_WRITE_TARGET: Failed to restore backup contents into the target instance
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_CONFLICT_UNR: Some restore conflicts are still unresolved. Finish choosing a resolution for each conflict first.
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_INVALID_CONF: The selected restore conflict resolution is invalid. Please review your choices.
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_FULL_REQUIRE: Full Minecraft Bedrock backups can only be restored into an empty target directory
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_LIP_INSTALL_: Some lip-managed packages failed to install
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_LIP_MISSING: Some lip-managed packages were not restored
errors.ERR_INSTANCE_BACKUP_RESTORE_LIP_VERSION_: Some lip-managed package versions do not match the backup

mods.importing_body: Please wait while processing selected files.
mods.confirm_delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete this {{type}}? This action cannot be undone.
mods.err_duplicate_folder: Module folder with same name exists
mods.overwrite_modal_body: A module folder with the same name exists. Overwrite (update)?
mods.toggle_desc_on: Mod is enabled and will load when the game starts.
mods.toggle_desc_off: Mod is disabled and will not load when the game starts.
mods.err_lip_install_failed_suggestion: Installation failed, please try reinstalling Minecraft

rc_warning.title: Experimental Version Warning
rc_warning.body_1: The LeviLamina version ({{version}}) you are about to install is a Release Candidate (RC).
rc_warning.body_2: This is an experimental version that may be unstable. It is recommended for developers or advanced users only.

mods.action_promote_install_success: {{name}} has been promoted to explicit install
mods.action_promote_install_failed_no_version: No installed version found for this package
mods.batch_update_body: Selected {{selected}} mods. {{updatable}} mod(s) can be updated from lip. Continue?
mods.batch_uninstall_body: You are about to uninstall {{count}} mod(s). Continue?
mods.err_ll_managed_in_version_settings: LeviLamina can only be managed in Version Settings
mods.lip_sync_loading: Local mods are ready. Completing lip information...
mods.lip_sync_error: lip information is temporarily unavailable. Showing local mods only.

terms.title: LeviLauncher License Agreement
terms.body:
Welcome to LeviLauncher

By using this software, you agree that:
• This is an unofficial Minecraft launcher
• You must own a legally licensed copy of Minecraft, otherwise the trial mode will be used automatically
• Any form of piracy or cheating is prohibited
• Use of mods/resource packs is at your own risk
• No affiliation with Mojang/Microsoft

Continuing to use indicates acceptance of the terms

curseforge.title: CurseForge
curseforge.load_error: Failed to load data, please retry

install.select_version_body: Please select the game instance to import to:
install.select_player_body: This content requires selecting a player:
install.success_desc: The content has been successfully imported to the selected instance.

lip.mapping_unavailable_hint: LeviLamina game version mapping is unavailable. Version-related filters have been disabled to avoid incorrect matches.

files.select_version_incompatible_hint: Version {{version}} is not compatible with game version {{gameVersion}}.
files.mapping_unavailable_blocked_hint: LeviLamina-to-game-version mapping is unavailable, so this installation has been blocked to avoid installing the wrong package.
files.ll_missing_redirect_hint: LeviLamina is not installed for this instance. Clicking Go to Loader will open the Loader tab in Instance Settings so you can install it manually first.
files.ll_missing_redirect_to_loader: LeviLamina is not installed. Redirecting to the Loader tab in Instance Settings.
files.ll_installed_incompatible_hint: Installed LeviLamina version {{installedVersion}} is incompatible with this package. Please adjust LeviLamina manually first.

guide.title: LIP Developer Guide
guide.description: If you want your mod to appear on LeviLauncher's LIP page, publish it according to the LIP package_manifest specification.
guide.manifest_hint: This dialog is only a quick overview for developers. Field names, required entries, examples, and validation rules are defined in the official documentation.
guide.variant_hint: A variant is indexed by the launcher only when its label contains client. By default, use "label": "client"; for sub-extensions, use "label": "client_xxxx" or "label": "client\xxxx".

guard.title: lipd is not installed
guard.description: lipd is not installed yet. To continue using lip-related pages or install LeviLamina, go to Settings > Third-party Components and install it first.

lip.title: lip Content

task_console.stage_fallback_delete: Package uninstall unavailable, fallback to directory delete

package.confirm_install_body: Are you sure you want to {{action}} {{package}} {{version}} for {{instance}}?

error.lip_not_installed: lip is not installed. Go to Settings > Components to install or update it manually.
error.nh_err_key_not_found: Game installer package validation failed. Please delete the installer and retry.
error.nh_err_unauthorized_caller: Please make sure the launcher exe name has not been changed (LeviLauncher.exe)

prompt.title: Help improve LeviLauncher?
prompt.body: With your permission, LeviLauncher uses Microsoft Clarity to collect anonymous interaction data to improve features and UI. It does not collect account information, game information, or disk content, and only applies to frontend pages. You can change this anytime in Settings > Privacy.
